project_area: Affordable housing creation, retention, and promotion for very low, low, and moderate-income households
demographic_requirements: Projects must serve very low, low, and moderate-income households
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofit corporations, municipal corporations, limited equity housing cooperatives, for-profit corporations, partnerships, and individuals. Capacity grants support staffing, training, planning, fundraising, and operations for nonprofits creating or preserving affordable housing.
